name: agronexus
description: One-command dev runner for the AgroNexus stack

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,web,ml -c green,cyan,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix web
